feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can SAP Best Practice Scenarios from Public Cloud be ported to SAP Best Practices Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,


The functional teams are looking at the various scenarios for SAP Best Practice Private Edition - and have found that the scenario is not available.  It is however available in the Public Cloud.  


Is there a way to activate retrofit these Public Cloud scenarios to Private Cloud.


Thanks.


 


PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Update/Swap Batch For Serialized Product In EWM During Deconsolidation From One HU To Different HU
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We need to update the batch during deconsolidation in EWM for serialized product. We have tried the same process using tcode /SCWM/DCONS but unfortunately we are not able to update the batch. Please find the attached documentation for the same. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: PPDS CIF queue (SMQ1) in system issue due to missing access for S_RFCACL object
entry.content:
Issue Summary: In our SAP system, the PPDS CIF queue (SMQ1) is encountering errors due to missing authorization for the S_RFCACL object. This occurs when a standard user conducts inspection activities on PPDS-relevant materials. During the sync process between S/4HANA and PPDS via the CIF kernel (using LiveCache), the system attempts to establish a remote function call, resulting in a stuck queue entry in SMQ1 with error:

00024: S_RFCACL authorization or SMTACL entry not maintained

Concern: Although multiple KBAs are available, it's unclear whether it's safe to grant S_RFCACL access broadly to all end users. Since this issue can potentially occur for any user triggering PPDS integration, we're considering a blanket authorization but are unsure of the security implications.

Request: Could you advise whether it's safe to provide all users access to the S_RFCACL authorization object, or if there's a better alternative to resolve this issue permanently without compromising system security? At present, we cannot predetermine which users require this access, leading to uncertainty around access control best practices.

entry.title: Creating RK when the reference document is in a legacy system (ECC)
entry.content: We are moving from ECC to S4/HANA and are wondering how Corrective invoice requests (RK) can be created with reference when the reference document is in ECC.

entry.title: Authorization - Restrict BP tcode
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we are looking for a solution to the following problem:

To create and modify business partners of the contact person type, we have created a role with authorization for B_BUPA_RLT with 000000 and BUP001.

In addition, certain users should also have change authorization for customer data (only for roles FLCU00 and FLCU01). However, if these users also have the role for contact persons, then change authorization for central customer data (GP role 000000) is also possible.

How can this be stopped?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Activation of Multiple Best Practice Country Solutions and Languages
entry.content:
Dear Sir or Madame,


We are planning to implement the SAP Best Practices for the following languages and country versions in our S/4HANA environment:


Languages:




  • German (DE)




  • PERSON_NAME (EN)




  • Spanish (ES)




  • Portuguese (PT)




  • French (FR)




  • Dutch (NL)



Country Versions:




  • PERSON_NAME (DE)




  • United Kingdom (UK)




  • Spain (ES)




  • PERSON_NAME (FR)




  • Portugal (PT)




  • Netherlands (NL)




  • Belgium (BE)




  • United States (US)



In the current SAP Service Request process, it seems that only one country version can be selected at a time. However, our project requires the parallel activation of multiple country solutions and languages.


Could you please advise how to proceed in this case and let us know what additional costs would be associated with the activation of multiple country versions?


Looking forward to your feedback.


Best regards,
PERSON_NAME Miesen


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: in iw31 getting error agreement item contains a different material Message no 06 387
entry.content: in iw31 getting error "agreement item contains a different material" after entering agreement on PM02 key external operation. While debugging i am seeing the material which is checked against the material present on agreement is blank. Where exactly should i fill the material on order so that comparison of it with agreement material wont get failed. Please note i have not checked the subcontracting flag. Does it needs to be checked mandatorily?

entry.title: Adobe Forms - Displaying nested loops
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am working on an adobe form and the requirement is to display 3 nested loops on the form. Could you please help me with the steps to follow here. Attaching a screenshot of the requirement.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Cost element category 90 in S4 - alternative approaches
entry.content:
Hello 

i understand cost element category 90 in public cloud is discontinued and in private cloud it is not recommended but still supported. In public cloud the alternative seems to be CE Type 1 if needed margin analysis characteristics are not automatically populated (e.g as with WIP). In our case we need to post MA characteristics on regular accrual accounts so need the BS account as account assignment. I tried to open BS accounts as type 1 in our private cloud system: this requires me to set a balance carry forward account then which makes no sense plus also does not allow OI managment. 

So replacing CE Type 90 with 1 in a private cloud environment does not seem to be the solution. What else can i do to avoid CE Type 90?

entry.title: Report Z_MRM_DELETE_PP_1 / Parked supplier invoice deletion is not possible: issue with FI document
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We need to delete parked documents that are part of a prepayment flow because when we try to post the parked invoice, we receive a message M8_2501 (see below).

 

We follow note https://me.sap.com/notes/2143933/E and implement report Z_MRM_DELETE_PP_1.

 

We did a copy of our Production system (client 500) to our development system (client 130) and quality (client 140).

 

Supplier invoice document: 5100207605

 

Fiscal year; 2024

 

Comapny: U720

 

So we tested the report Z_MRM_DELETE_PP_1 in development 130 and quality 140: it was working = Ssupplier invoice document: 5100207605/2024 has been deleted (status goes from parked to deleted).

 

But in production 500, it didn"t work. We receive message M8_2501.

 

- use tcode MIR4
- enter invoice document 5100207605 and fiscal year 2024
- go to change mode
- change the posting date to today"s date
- simulate --

entry.title: Intermittent Initial Load Slowness for Random T-Codes Affecting Random Users
entry.content:
Dear SAP BASIS/HANA Experts,

In our S/4 HANA production environment, we are encountering intermittent initial load slowness for various transaction codes (T-codes), affecting different users on a random basis. The issue occurs when a user executes a T-code for the first time during the day. Subsequent executions generally respond promptly. However, the issue may reoccur for the same or different users with different T-codes on the following days.

Our observations and findings are as follows:

  • The behavior is unpredictable, affecting random users and random T-codes.

  • The slowness is temporary, typically lasting 30–40 seconds, occasionally up to 1–2 minutes.

  • By the time the issue is reported, it has usually resolved, making it difficult to activate traces or collect dumps.

  • Analysis of STAD data reveals very high DB request times (sequential reads) during slowness against the affected user.

  • Affected users appear to be stuck in the “DYNPLOAD” action, as observed in SM50.

  • Program, screen buffer, table buffer parameters value are sufficient in ST02, No SWAP.

System Environment:

  • Standard architecture: S/4 application and HANA database hosted on the same server

  • Total RAM: 2 TB

  • HANA Memory Allocation Limit: 1600 GB

  • SAP Application Memory: 180 GB

  • Recent upgrade from 1.5 TB to 2 TB RAM completed prior to issue onset

We would appreciate your inputs and recommendations on how best to diagnose and address this behavior, particularly given the inconsistency and unpredictable nature of the symptoms.

Looking forward to your expert guidance.

entry.title: Not able to create BP relationship between Global customer and customer
entry.content: We have recently upgraded S4 version from 2019 to 2023. Currently we are getting an error when we were trying to create a relationships between Global customer and customer in company code. We used to be able to perform this task in older version. Now we are getting this error to do the same. Need some help in this. Thanks.

entry.title: Difference in VA05 output and BAPI_SALESORDER_GETLIST to get Open Orders Value
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

when i ran VA05 report to get open orders for customer A , numbers of orders came 39 while running the FM BAPI_SALESORDER_GETLIST for same customer , it fetched 22 orders , i am not able to find the reasoning on it . my objectve is to find the open orders value basis on customer to prepare a FS for a Z report

Please help on this to build the logic

entry.title: S4HANA LTMC
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to upload the General Data for a few customers and have chosen the BP grouping as Z001 which is internal number range.

The KUNNR field for On-Prem has been set to Visible from required in the appropriate Migration Object in Change View of Source Structure.

After the Upload file process and Data Transfer process I am getting the error attached .

Please find attached the file and the snapshot of the error .

Can someone please guide me and let me know what is going wrong.

Regards.

SM

entry.title: Problema para exibir códigos de imposto (MWSKZ) na MIRO?
entry.content:
Recentemente, enfrentei um desafio curioso em um cliente. Após a criação de um novo código de imposto (IVA), percebi que ele simplesmente não aparecia na lista suspensa da transação MIRO. O mais intrigante? Não era só o novo código — outros IVAs já existentes também estavam invisíveis.

Começou então a clássica jornada investigativa: consultei documentações no SAP for Me, revisei todas as configurações standard recomendadas pela SAP (inclusive a Nota 2122460) e... nada. Tudo parecia estar em ordem. A dúvida persistia: por que apenas alguns códigos apareciam? Confesso que, até então, nunca tinha passado por isso em projetos anteriores — mas sempre há uma primeira vez.

Com apoio de um Expert ABAP, iniciamos o debug e — voilà! — encontramos a raiz do problema: um enhancement customizado no módulo de função HELP_VALUES_GET_WITH_TABLE.

Essa função é bastante utilizada nas versões anteriores ao S/4HANA para personalizar a ajuda de pesquisa — o famoso F4 Help.

A solução envolveu revisar esse enhancement e considerar a configuração sugerida na Nota 2122460, ou a substituição da função para F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST, já que a HELP_VALUES_GET_WITH_TABLE está obsoleta no S/4HANA.

Se você estiver enfrentando algo parecido, recomendo consultar as seguintes notas SAP:

  • 2122460 – MIRO/MIR4/MIR7: Códigos de imposto ausentes na lista suspensa
  • 3213274 – Substituição de HELP_VALUES_GET_WITH_TABLE

Abraços
Geziel R Cruz

entry.title: Standard Message type for the Inbound IDOC 944 for Posting GR against Inbound delivery
entry.content: Hello Team, We have a requirement to perform PGR wrt HU based IBD and Goods movement status should be updated in IBD w.r.t the inbound idoc 944 received from our 3PL (FYI...3PL received the outbound Del info as a part of Outbound idoc from SAP) .We understood that MBGMCR supports only non-HU based IBD and do the GR against PO/STO line items. We looked for DESADV and WMBBXY as well but with no success .We are planning to build a custom solution as a last option. But before that we would like to know if there is any standard SAP message type existing to achieve the above requirement.

entry.title: Express document "Update was canceled" received from author "Jenish Lilawala".
entry.content:
When user will use transaction code ME28 for PO Release L2 level get below error:

Express document "Update was canceled" received from author "Jenish Lilawala".

We have check below points from over-end:
1.Release Strategy L2 level getting issue.
2.Output Determination issue in this YNEU message type.
3.When we click on Print Preview system gives error "No contact person found".

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Email Storage Location in S4 Client Profile
entry.content:
Hello,

In S4, within the client profile, in the "Address" tab, I am looking for the table where email addresses are stored, which seem to be listed under the "Address Independent Communication" section. Can you confirm this or indicate precisely where to find them?

Thank you,

Best regard

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#SalesOrder-manageV2"
how to display technical field name on Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

 

On Fiori when we press F1 , the technical field name not show as picture attached.

pls advise how to display technical field name on Fiori?

is this the same field name as on SAPGUI or new table field?

Thanks in advance
